assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking Istio-K8s compatibility and recommends using Istio versions within 1-2 minor versions of K8s version

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions verifying Istio 1.32 compatibility with GKE 1.32 and includes command to check compatibility matrix

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Clearly outlines upgrade order with 'Phase 2: Upgrade Istio Control Plane First' before 'Phase 3: Upgrade GKE Cluster'

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Mentions webhook configurations and includes command to check mutating webhook configuration, though could be more explicit about drain/recreation issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Addresses this in Phase 4 with rolling restart to get new sidecars and includes commands to check current proxy versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes istioctl proxy-status command to check proxy versions and emphasizes monitoring proxy sync status throughout

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'istioctl proxy-status', kubectl commands to check versions, and istioctl analyze

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Addresses version mismatch concerns through phased upgrade approach and monitoring, though could be more explicit about traffic disruption risks
